case_title: LOIS EDBLAD VS. SARAH SALEH ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TERMINATING 11/16/16 ORDER GRANTING MONTHLY PAYMENT PLAN OF $100.00 PER MONTH: BALANCE OF JUDGMENT IS NOW COLLECTIBLE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDBLAD, LOIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALEH, SARAH $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,110.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST FIONA CHAN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FIONA CHAN, WHO WAS DISMISSED WIHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST AT TODAY'S HEARING. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED.
